title: WWE uses AI to analyse audience reactions and guide creative decisions, TKO president confirms
description: WWE is using AI to analyze audience reactions and shape storytelling, TKO President Mark Shapiro confirmed. Nick Khan and Triple H are leading the effort, though testing remains limited.

title: Huawei expects AI chip revenue to jump at least 60% this year, FT reports
Huawei expects AI chip revenue to jump at least 60% this year, FT reports

title: XstraStar Launches GEO Solution Designed to Help Brands Gain Visibility in AI Search Platforms
description: XstraStar, a technology services company, has announced the commercial availability of its Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) solution — a full-funnel brand visibility service built for the AI search era. The company is positioning GEO as a necessary evolution beyond traditional...
